query: I want an n8n AI Agent that can archive workflows, but only after the user confirms. How should the AI Agent node and action tool be designed?
expected_behavior: Recommends a proposal-and-confirmation flow before any action tool call
Explains that the system message must forbid destructive actions before confirmation
Explains that the tool description should repeat the confirmation requirement
Suggests narrow tool input such as action plus an array of IDs
Advises against free-form destructive tool inputs
Mentions that the tool should return acknowledgement data so the agent can report real outcomes
